adaptedResources.author: DscSamples
adaptedResources.description: The `NpmInstall` DSC resource is used to install all npm packages listed in a `package.json` file.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description: Specifies whether the npm packages should be present or absent. Defaults to `Present`.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Global.title: Global
Global.description: Indicates whether to install packages globally.

PackageDirectory.title: PackageDirectory
PackageDirectory.description: The directory containing the `package.json` file. If not specified, the current directory is used.

Arguments.title: Arguments
Arguments.description: Additional arguments to pass to `npm install`.

embedded.description: The `NpmInstall` DSC resource is used to install all npm packages listed in a `package.json` file.
embedded.title: NpmDsc/NpmInstall

adaptedResources.author: DscSamples
adaptedResources.description: The `NpmPackage` DSC Resource allows you to manage the installation, update, and removal of npm packages. This resource ensures that the specified npm package is in the desired state.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description: Specifies whether the npm package should be present or absent. The default value is `Present`.

Name.title: Name
Name.description: The name of the npm package to manage. This is a key property.

Version.title: Version
Version.description: The version of the npm package to install. If not specified, the latest version will be installed.

PackageDirectory.title: PackageDirectory
PackageDirectory.description: The directory where the npm package should be installed. If not specified, the package will be installed in the current directory.

Global.title: Global
Global.description: Indicates whether the npm package should be installed globally.

Arguments.title: Arguments
Arguments.description: Additional arguments to pass to `npm install` or `npm uninstall`.

embedded.description: The `NpmPackage` DSC Resource allows you to manage the installation, update, and removal of npm packages. This resource ensures that the specified npm package is in the desired state.
embedded.title: NpmDsc/NpmPackage
